_comment_internal: Internal license API (VERIFY_ACTIVATION etc). docker-compose deliberately does NOT publish this port — only sibling containers on the `michi` network can reach it. The public port (5005) refuses INTERNAL outright.
_comment_itch: itch.io proof-of-purchase, checked ONCE at ACTIVATE. itch_api_key and itch_game_id come from the MICHI_ITCH_API_KEY / MICHI_ITCH_GAME_ID environment variables (see SERVERS/.env.example) — the API key is yours, not a player's, and must never ship to clients or be committed. Leave both empty/0 here. If unset, activation is UNGATED and anyone who asks gets a free license.
_comment_secrets: internal_api_key is read from MICHI_INTERNAL_API_KEY and must match multiplayer_server's. Never commit the real value.
